item.name: Midnight Carp
item.description:
This timid wavekin would rather you didn't find it lurking in the depths of Lake Toari.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Hiding in the very depths of Lake Toari, or “lake of dawn,” this dark grey wavekin is easily mistaken for a patch of gloom the morning light has somehow forgotten to illuminate.
